description.value:
Frequency twice per day

You've studied medicine further to help others overcome illness and addiction. Choose an affliction and up to two of the following conditions affecting an adjacent ally: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Confused], @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Controlled], @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Drained], @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Frightened], @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Sickened], @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Stupefied]. You reduce the stage of that affliction by 1 and the value of the conditions by 1. If the target still has the affliction or at least one of the conditions, attempt a @Check[medicine|options:counteract] check to counteract those remaining afflictions and conditions. Your counteract rank is equal to half your level rounded up.

value.value: expert in Medicine or Doctor in Training
